name: Trust Document Compliance Refactor
description: Compliance-first workflow for classifying, rewriting, and governing trust and administrative documents before use in bank, court, IRS, credit bureau, or creditor contexts.

preExecution: Could this be treated as frivolous, fraudulent, threatening, or misleading?
Does it need attorney or CPA review?

agents.name: Document Intake Agent
agents.description: Reads uploaded document text. Segments by section. Extracts document ID, title, date, parties, addresses, filing numbers, and sensitive-data flags.

agents.name: Risk Classifier Agent
agents.description: Clause-level classification: GREEN (usable with minor cleanup), YELLOW (useful intent, rewrite required), RED (do not send/file/rely on without attorney or CPA review).

agents.name: Compliance Rewrite Agent
agents.description: Converts YELLOW clauses into bank-safe, court-safe, agency-safe language. RED clauses are blocked. Preserves trust law, contract law, fiduciary duty, due process, accounting, verification, good faith, and administrative fairness principles.

agents.name: Evidence Binder Agent
agents.description: Builds public and reserve exhibit indexes. Public exhibits may be transmitted externally after safety gates pass. Reserve exhibits are internal only.

agents.name: Action Recommendation Agent
agents.description: Recommends permitted next steps per destination context. Blocks unsafe actions and provides rewrite options.

agents.name: Receipt Agent
agents.description: Emits an immutable run receipt for every intake, classification, rewrite, block, export, and recommendation.

actionRegistry.ALLOW: Clause passed all safety gates. Proceed with standard review.
actionRegistry.REWRITE_REQUIRED: Clause passed intake but requires compliance rewrite before external use.
actionRegistry.BLOCKED: Clause failed safety gates. Do not export, file, or submit. Internal review only.
